protocol_notes: Topical serum recipe: 0.60g GHK-Cu (2%), 0.30g hyaluronic acid (1%), 0.30mL phenoxyethanol (1%) preservative in ~28.8mL distilled water. Final volume ~30mL. Solution turns medium blue. Hydration time: 60 minutes at room temperature. Shelf life 8-12 weeks refrigerated. Stored in amber container. User notes to double recipe if used on multiple areas daily.
